entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum evaluated for salt tolerance during germination and early seedling growth.

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand high salinity levels.

entities.name: SHOOT LENGTH
entities.description: A growth parameter used to assess the impact of salinity on the plant.

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: A growth parameter used to assess the impact of salinity on the plant.

entities.name: GERMINATION SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of seeds to germinate under salt stress.

entities.name: EARLY SEEDLING GROWTH SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of seedlings to grow under salt stress.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The stress condition induced by NaCl concentrations of 0, 75, 100, or 150 mM.

entities.name: HOAGLAND'S SOLUTIONS
entities.description: The nutrient solutions used as the medium for seed germination and seedling growth.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying genomic regions associated with salt tolerance traits using mapping populations.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X SALINITY INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between different genetic lines and salinity levels affecting growth parameters.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of ICRISAT where the pearl millet lines were obtained.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where Patancheru is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research materials were sourced.
